---
title: "The Rev. William Upton Richards"
---

## The Rev. William Upton Richards

**Dates:** (1811–1873)

### Description

Vicar of All Saints, Margaret Street, London, from 1845.

### Biography

He was founder (1848), with Harriet Brownlow, of the Society of All Saints’ Sisters of the Poor, which ran a home for incurable women and children in Mortimer Street during the 1850s and in 1859 began to take over the nursing at UCH. [ODNB; Holloway 1959]

### Letters

- Letter from Novr 23d 1858

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
